evidence_summary: Focused stringStartsWith native prefix tracer, neighbor text tracers, primitive inventory matcher, rg evidence checks, git diff --check, cabal build all, cabal test, and thesis conformance gate passed; diff matches the selected item and docs preserve future-work boundaries.
